title: Dashboard + Settings + Admin + Client CRUD + Rate Limiting + Polish
description: Implements Slice 6 exactly per implementation_plan.md: dashboard summary and live sync, notification bell/read-all, category CRUD + reorder validation, preferences scope semantics, admin user/company management, client CRUD, observation merge endpoint, global rate limiting, onboarding, accessibility, and French UX polish. Introduces company-deletion-job background job for async company data deletion per §6.11.

env_vars_required.description: PostgreSQL DSN for Drizzle and API handlers
Redis URL for BullMQ, pub/sub, and rate limiting
mem0 API key for preferences read/delete

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Implement GET with auth() and withTenant(). Return documents_by_status with all 8 keys (uploaded, ocr_processing, ocr_done, embedding, embedded, extracting, review_ready, failed), unresolved_conflict_count, recent_documents(limit 5 by created_at desc), recent_reports(limit 5 by generated_at desc, no html_snapshot_url). Cite and reuse src/lib/auth.ts, src/lib/db/rls.ts, src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts, src/lib/db/schema/conflicts.ts, src/lib/db/schema/reports.ts.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Support unread filter + pagination; enforce visibility (user_id = session.user_id OR user_id IS NULL) within session company; return { data, total, page, pageSize } sorted by created_at desc with fields notification_id,type,payload,read,created_at,user_id. Reuse notification enum from Slice 1 schema (notification_type) and Slice 4 SSE notification integration.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Validate ownership and company scope, set read=true idempotently, return { notification_id, read: true }, and return 404 when row is missing/out-of-scope. Use withTenant() and notification table model from src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: PATCH endpoint sets read=true for unread notifications for session user in session company; response { updated_count }; idempotent when no unread rows.

files.purpose: Expand categories route to GET + POST contract.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: GET returns nested { categories: CategoryNode[] } sorted by sort_order asc per sibling. POST validates name<=100 and optional parent_category_id, enforces max depth 5, computes path synchronously, assigns sort_order = MAX+1 among siblings, returns created node payload.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: PATCH body { ordered_ids: UUID[], parent_category_id: UUID|null } where parent_category_id key is required even when null. Validate all ordered_ids share exact requested parent; mixed parents => 422 { code: mixed_parents }. In one transaction update sort_order by array index and return { updated_count }.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: PATCH supports { name?, parent_category_id? }, recomputes path for self + descendants in one transaction, enforces depth<=5 and path length<=500. DELETE is authenticated and role-limited (admin/editor), returns 409 has_children or 409 has_documents guards, otherwise 204.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: GET accepts optional scope and defaults to user:{ctx.userId}:company:{ctx.companyId}; on mem0 timeout returns 200 { preferences: {} }. DELETE accepts optional scope; without scope deletes all user+company scopes; validates scope pattern user:{uuid}:company:{uuid}(:client:{uuid})? and scope user matches ctx.userId; mem0 timeout returns 503 { code: mem0_unavailable }.

files.purpose: Admin user list/create without invite lifecycle.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: GET admin-only paginated users { user_id,email,role,created_at }. POST admin-only validates email + role(editor|viewer), enforces 409 email_already_exists and 409 email_belongs_to_other_company, creates active user and returns 201 payload. Reference Slice 1 user schema and JWT role contract in src/types/auth.ts.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: PATCH admin-only updates role with last_admin guard. DELETE admin-only enforces last_admin and cannot_delete_self, returns 204 on success.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: PATCH admin-only validates path company id equals session company_id and name length 1..100, returns { company_id,name,updated_at }.

files.purpose: Admin company data deletion trigger endpoint.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: DELETE admin-only validates tenant match and body confirm=true, writes final audit entry, starts asynchronous deletion workflow, returns 202 accepted. Keep API behavior aligned with Slice 6 security section and danger-zone UX.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: GET paginated clients with case-insensitive name search and { data,total,page,pageSize }. POST editor/admin creates client with { name,description? } in session company and returns 201 payload. Reuse clients/report relations from Slice 1 schema modules.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: GET returns single client or 404 via tenant scope; PATCH editor/admin updates fields; DELETE admin-only blocks with 409 has_reports when referenced by reports, else 204.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: POST body { observation_ids(min2), canonical_label, canonical_normalized_key }. Validate snake_case key and that all observations are approved and in ctx.companyId; otherwise 422 non_approved_observations with offending ids. Update label+normalized_key for all and write one AuditLog row per observation; return { updated_count, canonical_normalized_key }. Cite src/lib/db/schema/observations.ts and src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts audit_log model from Slice 1.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Render OnboardingWelcomeCard when total documents is zero, else PipelineStatusBar + DashboardSummaryCards. Add dashboard client wrapper that listens to pipeline_stage_changed, notification, and conflict_detected SSE events and debounces router.refresh() to once per 2s for RSC consistency. Also performs immediate local-state update of documents_by_status counts on pipeline_stage_changed events (incrementing target status count and decrementing previous status count) before the debounced full refresh fires.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Viewer role redirects to dashboard with unauthorized toast. Render CompanyNameForm, PreferencesSection, admin-only team management section, category manager link, and admin-only danger zone requiring company-name confirmation before DELETE /api/companies/{id}/data.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render UserTable with InviteUserDialog, role edit, delete actions, pagination, French empty states, and server-protected admin access.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Mount CategoryTreeManager with categories initial tree, optimistic reorder, create/rename/delete flows, and 409/422 error handling.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render status cards and recent documents/reports blocks from dashboard summary payload using French labels and existing design tokens.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render horizontal distribution of the 8 pipeline statuses with zero-safe handling and French status copy.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render first-run welcome state and upload CTA when there are no documents.

files.purpose: Bell with unread badge + read-all action.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Fetch unread counts from GET /api/notifications?unread=true, listen to SSE notification events, render latest 20 items, and call PATCH /api/notifications/read-all.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render type-specific icon/text for pipeline_completed, pipeline_failed, conflict_detected, report_ready, manual_obs_requested with French copy and relative timestamps.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Use DndContext + PointerSensor activationDistance 8 + SortableContext per sibling group; optimistic reorder then debounced PATCH /api/categories/reorder with { ordered_ids,parent_category_id }; revert on 422 mixed_parents. During the debounce window after a drag completes, disable further drag interactions (via DndContext disabled prop or pointer-events-none) until the PATCH /api/categories/reorder response returns or the debounce fires.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render expand/collapse, drag handle with aria-grabbed, and actions for rename/delete/new child with max-depth UX guards.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: shadcn Dialog + Form with validation for name length and clear French error messages.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Inline edit form calling PATCH /api/companies/{id} with optimistic UI and rollback on error.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Display read-only preferences and delete-all action via DELETE /api/preferences with confirm flow and French toasts.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Paginated rows with role update and delete actions, handling last_admin and cannot_delete_self errors correctly.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Modal form for email + role calling POST /api/users; no invitation lifecycle/state in MVP.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Provide variants dashboard|documents-list|observation-list|report-detail|chat|settings and avoid full-page spinners.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Render illustration/title/description/optional CTA and reuse across all target pages in Slice 6.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: shadcn destructive Alert with retry callback and optional support link; used consistently in list and mutation error states.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Persist per-user dismissal in localStorage key reportflow:onboarding:{user_id}; show steps for first login/no docs, first extraction_complete, and first report_ready with deferred display when target element is absent.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Wrap with OnboardingProvider and ensure AnimatePresence mode=wait with transition initial {opacity:0,y:8}, animate {opacity:1,y:0}, exit {opacity:0}, duration 0.18. Include a skip-to-main-content anchor link as first focusable element for screen-reader accessibility, targeting the main content area with id='main-content'.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: viewer hides Chat/Conflits/Paramètres; editor hides Paramètres except category-management access path; admin sees all links; keep French labels unchanged. Below lg breakpoint, Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode with tooltip labels on hover, preserving full navigation accessibility.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Embed NotificationBell, wire unread count and latest notifications to /api/notifications endpoints and pipeline SSE notification events.

sections.label: patch
sections.content: Apply per-user limit of 100 req/min for authenticated API routes; exclude /api/auth/* and /login; return 429 with Retry-After when exceeded; SSE endpoints count one initial request only.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Implement sliding minute window counter using Redis INCR + EXPIRE key rl:{user_id}:{minute_bucket}; return { allowed, remaining, retryAfterSeconds }.

files.purpose: BullMQ job handler for company data deletion workflow.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Processes company-deletion-job from BullMQ queue. Deletes company data in stages: evidence_blocks → observations → document_versions → documents → categories → clients → reports → chat_sessions → notifications → audit_log (final entry preserved). For each stage: DELETE with company_id filter, emit data_deletion_progress SSE event via Redis pub/sub with { company_id, stage, records_deleted, total_stages, current_stage_index }. On final stage emit complete status. On any stage failure, emit failed status with error detail. Uses withTenant from src/lib/db/rls.ts and all relevant schema modules.

files.purpose: Centralized French copy constants for all user-facing strings.

sections.label: implementation
sections.content: Exports a structured object of all French UI strings used across dashboard, documents, observations, conflicts, reports, chat, settings, notifications, onboarding, errors, and form validation messages. Provides type-safe keys for consistent string references across components.

validation_rules: Tenant scope derived from JWT company_id only.
documents_by_status must always include uploaded, ocr_processing, ocr_done, embedding, embedded, extracting, review_ready, failed keys.
implementation_notes: Use src/lib/auth.ts auth() and src/lib/db/rls.ts withTenant().
Conflict count uses src/lib/db/schema/conflicts.ts conflict_case where resolution_status != user_overridden.
Recent reports shape follows Slice 5 reports list policy: do not return html_snapshot_url in list surfaces.

validation_rules: Include rows where user_id=session.user_id OR user_id IS NULL.
Support unread=true filter and created_at desc sort.
implementation_notes: Notification types must match Slice 1 enum notification_type in migration/schema: pipeline_completed, pipeline_failed, conflict_detected, report_ready, manual_obs_requested.
SSE notification event integration remains on Slice 2/4 pipeline channel /api/pipeline/events.

validation_rules: Row must belong to session company and be user-specific for session user or company-wide.
implementation_notes: Use withTenant from src/lib/db/rls.ts for company isolation.

validation_rules: Update only unread rows for session user within session company.
Idempotent when no unread rows exist.
implementation_notes: MR-12 single-request mark-all-read contract.

validation_rules: Return nested tree sorted by sort_order asc at each sibling level.
implementation_notes: Build on Slice 3 categories read contract and extend shape for manager UI.

validation_rules: parent_category_id must exist in same company when provided.
implementation_notes: Depth and path behavior must follow Slice 6 category management contract in implementation_plan.md.

validation_rules: At least one of name or parent_category_id must be present.
If recomputed path length > 500 return path_too_long.
implementation_notes: Path recomputation for descendants must be synchronous in the same transaction.
On parent_category_id change (move), set sort_order = MAX(sort_order) + 1 among new parent's siblings to place moved category at end.

validation_rules: Cannot delete category assigned to documents.
implementation_notes: DELETE route is authenticated and role-restricted per Slice 6 API inventory.

validation_rules: parent_category_id key required even when null.
all ordered_ids must share same parent_category_id.
implementation_notes: RISK-05 resolution: parent_category_id mandatory in body and validated server-side before update.
When ordered_ids is a subset of all siblings under parent_category_id, only the provided IDs receive new sort_order values; unlisted siblings retain their existing sort_order unchanged.

validation_rules: If provided scope must follow supported format.
Scope user segment must match session user when explicit.
implementation_notes: On mem0 timeout return 200 with empty preferences per Slice 6 degraded-mode rule and Slice 5 mem0 behavior.

validation_rules: scope user segment must equal session user_id.
implementation_notes: RISK-06 resolution for scoped and all-scopes deletion behavior.
RISK-10 resolution: no invitation lifecycle status, users are active immediately after POST /api/users.
Reference user role enum from src/lib/db/schema/auth.ts and JWT role union in src/types/auth.ts.

validation_rules: last_admin guard prevents demoting final admin.
implementation_notes: Use Slice 6 last-admin guard behavior and preserve auth schema from Slice 1.
Deletion preserves authored data where schema references use SET NULL or restrictive FKs.

validation_rules: Path id must equal session company_id.
implementation_notes: Uses company schema from Slice 1 auth tables and route-level admin check from Slice 6 security section.

validation_rules: Path id must equal session company_id.
implementation_notes: Write final audit entry before deletion workflow; endpoint itself returns 202 per Slice 6 contract.
Use clients table relations from src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts and report FK guard from src/lib/db/schema/reports.ts.
MR-03 client create behavior; tenant scope enforced through withTenant from Slice 1.
Client ownership is company-scoped per Slice 1 schema and RLS wrapper usage.
Patch semantics align with Slice 6 client CRUD section (MR-03).

validation_rules: Block if reports reference this client_id.
implementation_notes: Use report FK relationship from Slice 1 report schema to enforce has_reports guard.

validation_rules: all observations must belong to session company.
all observations status must be approved.

error_responses.condition: One or more observations not approved

implementation_notes: Write one audit row per updated observation in audit_log schema introduced in Slice 1.
Observation status semantics must match Slice 3 state machine and observation schema enum.

background_jobs.trigger: DELETE /api/companies/{id}/data endpoint enqueues job after writing final audit entry.

steps.label: Delete pending manual observations
steps.detail: Delete all pending_manual_observation rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'pending_manual_observations'.

steps.label: Delete conflict resolutions
steps.detail: Delete all conflict_resolution rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'conflict_resolutions'.

steps.label: Delete conflict cases
steps.detail: Delete all conflict_case rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'conflict_cases'.

steps.label: Delete derivation results
steps.detail: Delete all derivation_result rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'derivation_results'.

steps.label: Delete report sections
steps.detail: Delete all report_section rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'report_sections'.

steps.label: Delete reports
steps.detail: Delete all report rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'reports'.

steps.label: Delete observations
steps.detail: Delete all observation rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'observations'.

steps.label: Delete attestation records
steps.detail: Delete all attestation_record rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'attestation_records'.

steps.label: Delete evidence blocks
steps.detail: Delete all evidence_block rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'evidence_blocks'.

steps.label: Delete document versions
steps.detail: Delete all document_version rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'document_versions'.

steps.label: Delete documents
steps.detail: Delete all document rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'documents'.

steps.label: Delete clients
steps.detail: Delete all client rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'clients'.

steps.label: Delete document categories
steps.detail: Delete all document_category rows for the company, starting from leaf nodes. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'document_categories'.

steps.label: Delete chat sessions and messages
steps.detail: Delete all chat_message rows followed by chat_session rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'chat_sessions'.

steps.label: Delete audit logs
steps.detail: Delete all audit_log rows for the company except the final entry written by the trigger endpoint. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'audit_logs'.

steps.label: Delete notification preferences
steps.detail: Delete all notification and preference_memory_pointer rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'notification_preferences'.

steps.label: Delete users
steps.detail: Delete all user rows for the company. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'users'.

steps.label: Clean up mem0 memory scope
steps.detail: Delete all mem0 memory entries scoped to the company (user:*:company:{company_id} and user:*:company:{company_id}:client:* patterns). Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'mem0_cleanup'.

steps.label: Delete R2 objects
steps.detail: Remove all R2 objects for documents and reports belonging to the company (document uploads and rendered report HTML/PDF artifacts). Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'r2_cleanup'.

steps.label: Delete company row and complete
steps.detail: Delete the company row itself. Emit data_deletion_progress event with stage 'complete' and status complete.

error_handling: On stage failure: emit data_deletion_progress with stage 'failed' and error detail.
BullMQ retries once (total 2 attempts) on transient failures.
Partial deletion is acceptable; admin can re-trigger from settings page.

CategoryNode

constants.name: SONNER_TOAST_CONFIG
constants.value: { position: 'bottom-right', duration: { success: 5000, warning: 8000 }, richColors: true, closeButton: true }
constants.purpose: Sonner Toaster configuration: success 5s auto-dismiss, error persistent until dismissed, warning 8s, position bottom-right.

sse_events.emitted_by: pipeline worker via src/lib/pipeline/pubsub.ts on Redis channel pipeline:events:{company_id}
sse_events.consumed_by: src/app/(app)/page.tsx dashboard wrapper for debounced router.refresh()

sse_events.emitted_by: Slice 4 semantic conflict flow on pipeline SSE channel
sse_events.consumed_by: dashboard wrapper and conflicts badge counters

payload.stage: string (e.g. documents | evidence_blocks | observations | complete | failed)

sse_events.consumed_by: src/app/(app)/settings/page.tsx — shows live deletion progress and redirects to /login on complete

acceptance_criteria: GET /api/dashboard/summary returns all 8 PipelineStatus keys in documents_by_status with zero defaults.
Dashboard shows OnboardingWelcomeCard when no documents exist and hides it after first upload.
PATCH /api/categories/reorder with mixed parent IDs returns 422 with code mixed_parents.
DELETE /api/categories/{id} returns 409 has_children when children exist and 204 when safe.
Category path values for descendants update correctly immediately after rename or move.
DELETE /api/preferences?scope=user:{id}:company:{id} returns 204 and subsequent GET returns empty preferences.
DELETE /api/preferences without scope clears all scopes for session user and company.
POST /api/users as admin returns 201 payload with user_id,email,role,created_at; non-admin returns 403.
PATCH /api/users/{id} demoting final admin returns 422 last_admin.
POST /api/observations/merge with non-approved observation returns 422 non_approved_observations.
POST /api/observations/merge success updates canonical key on all rows and creates one audit row per observation.
Category drag reorder triggers exactly one PATCH /api/categories/reorder after debounce with parent_category_id and ordered_ids.
Notification bell unread badge increments within 2s of notification SSE event and click marks item read.
All major routes use content-shape skeletons with no full-page spinner.
All user-facing strings are French in normal operation.
Manual observation popup accessibility behavior remains: focus trap and Escape to skip endpoint.

known_spec_deviations.reason: MVP intentionally skips email invitation status workflow; POST /api/users creates immediately active users per Slice 6 RISK-10 resolution.

implementation_order: Implement src/lib/middleware/rate-limit.ts and middleware integration first to enforce MR-16 globally.
Build /api/dashboard/summary and dashboard page sync behavior with pipeline_stage_changed, notification, and conflict_detected events.
Complete notifications APIs (GET, PATCH read, PATCH read-all) and integrate NotificationBell in TopBar.
Implement categories POST/PATCH/DELETE and reorder endpoint with mixed_parents validation; then ship CategoryTreeManager UI.
Implement preferences GET/DELETE scope validation and wire PreferencesSection UX.
Implement users APIs with last_admin and cannot_delete_self guards, then UserTable and InviteUserDialog.
Implement company settings PATCH and deletion trigger endpoint behavior (202 + audit-first flow).
Implement clients CRUD endpoints and delete guard based on report references.
Implement observations merge endpoint with approval enforcement and one-audit-row-per-observation behavior.
Add dashboard/settings/notification/category missing UI files, onboarding provider, skeleton/empty/error components, French copy pass, and accessibility checks.
Run verification against acceptance criteria for mixed_parents, dashboard status keys, last_admin, merge semantics, and notification live updates.
